name: Sajodaerim Corporation
summary: Sajodaerim Corporation operates in the fishing industry in Korea. The company operates in the fisheries, food processing, food logistics, and retailing sectors. It is also involved in the manufacture, logistics, and retailing of processed foods, such as fishcakes, crab-flavored fish sticks, hams, and sausages under the Daerim Seon brand; and production and vending of frozen and refrigerated foods, salted seafood, seasoned dried laver, dried sea mustards, and other products. In addition, the company engages in producing, processing, and retailing pork and fowl; and livestock business. Sajodaerim Corporation was founded in 1945 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
